scripts.build:contracts: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool stellar contract build
scripts.build:contracts:native: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --docker-platform native stellar contract build
scripts.lint: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo fmt -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings" stellar
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo clippy --all-targets --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged && cargo fmt" stellar
scripts.package:source: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool extra stellar package-source --output .artifacts/.incoming/contracts-source.zip
scripts.test: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo nextest run" stellar
